center.name: 中部非洲
center.summary: 中部非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括Black guinea fowl、Plumed guinea fowl、绿冠蕉鹃等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in grassland and fields in Southern, Central and East Africa, south-east of a line from Angola through the DRCongo to Sudan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = }} The black guinea fowl (Agelastes niger) is a terrestrial bird of the Numididae (guinea fowl) family found in humid forests in West-Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-bellied sandgrouse is found across most of northern and central Africa and further east towards western and southern Asia. These birds are wide-stretching, inhibiting mostly the Afrotropic and Indomalayan biogeographic realms. The chestnut-bellied sandgrouse tends to prefer bare, bushy arid and sandy plains as its habitat. The chestnut-bellied sandgrouse that can be found in India is found most abundantly in the Thar or Sindh Desert

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in forests in Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West and Central Africa from Sierra Leone to the Democratic Republic of the Congo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Central Africa as well as in the Albertine Rift montane forests and northern adjacent areas of Kenya, Uganda and the eastern Congo Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This black-and-white species is found in humid forest and second growth in Central and West Africa, ranging from Senegal east to Uganda and south to Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in humid primary forest in Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Nigeria and Central Africa

birds.evidence: The red-winged grey warbler (Drymocichla incana) is a small to medium size bird in the family Cisticolidae that is native to Central Africa

birds.evidence: This species is found in Central and Western Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Found in several small patches of Central and East Africa, Turner's eremomela's distribution is quite patchy and not very well known

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The vinaceous dove is a common bird that is found in central and western African countries such as Senegal, Gambia, Burkina Faso, Benin, and Nigeria. This species is abundant in scrub and savannah

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: doi : 10.14344/IOC.ML.10.2. | subdivision = * Pogoniulus coryphaea angolensis - (Boulton, 1931) * Pogoniulus coryphaea coryphaea - (Reichenow, 1892) * Pogoniulus coryphaea hildamariae - (Sclater, WL, 1938) | synonyms = }} The western tinkerbird (Pogoniulus coryphaea) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae native to Central Africa, where it has been recorded at altitudes from . It has a threefold area of presence : the Angolan montane forest–grassland mosaic, the Western High Plateau and the Albertine Rift montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Guinea turaco has an extremely large range and a stable population. It can be found in forests of West and Central Africa, ranging from Senegal east to DR Congo and south to northern Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: British Ornithologists' Union. In east Africa and central Africa, the tawny eagle is found in central and eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and throughout the drier portions of Uganda and in the entire nations of Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia (quite often residing in the Luangwa valley and the Chambeshi drainage), Malawi and Mozambique

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-tailed hawk occurs in the tropical rainforests of western and central Africa, from Guinea in the west, along the Gulf of Guinea coast south to northern Angola, east to the southern Central African Republic, northern Democratic Republic of Congo, South Sudan and western Uganda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Central Africa; it is a summer migrant to more southerly areas
